comment.body:
Nothing beats his Bear Stearns call before the 08’ crash. The fact he didn’t lose all credibility then is beyond me. Blows my mind.

Then again, it seems “The 48 Laws of Power” by Robert Greene is something that will always exist in the human psyche. Machiavellianism is just too temping to not pursue, especially, like in a game theory scenario, where one can get 5 points and their “competitor” gets 0.

Or in Jim’s case with Bear Stearns, let mom and pop retail investors bag hold massive losses while his buddies pile out the back door.

Cheers to the person who shared that video before. Here it is again:

https://youtu.be/mScpHTIi-kM?si=b_C7Sgt00SLybtCR
